Serving Manchester & The Northwest

MOT & Garage Management Software for Manchester Garages

Increase your garage revenue by 40% with automated MOT reminders, DVSA integration, and smart advisory tracking. Supporting garages across Manchester, Salford, Stockport, and Cheshire.

Start Free TrialCall Us: 07380 448187

Why Manchester Garages Choose Garage Boost

Manchester garages face unique challenges: high competition, mobile-heavy customer base, seasonal demand swings. Our software is built to help you win.

🔗

DVSA MOT Integration

Direct access to official DVSA MOT data for Manchester vehicles. Know exact compliance dates.

📈

40% Revenue Increase

Manchester garages average +£3,200-5,100/month. Proven by City Motors, Manchester (+£3,200/month in 60 days).

📱

Automated SMS/Email

Reminders at 30, 14, 7 days before MOT expiry. 98% SMS open rate. SMS outperforms email by 3x.

💡

Advisory Capture

Automatically turn MOT advisories into quoted jobs. Average: £150+ per job. 2-3 advisories per failed MOT.

👥

Complete CRM

Single customer view with vehicle history, MOT dates, advisories, and service records.

🏢

UK Support

Based in London but understand Manchester garage market. Phone, email, and chat support available.

Get Started In 3 Easy Steps

1

Connect DVSA

Link your garage MOT test station account. We fetch customer MOT records automatically. Takes 2 minutes.

2

Enable Reminders

Choose reminder dates. Customize messages. We send SMS at 30, 14, 7 days before expiry.

3

Watch Revenue Grow

Track bookings, conversions, and revenue in your dashboard. Analyze what's working.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Garage Boost work with Manchester MOT test stations?

Yes. We integrate with DVSA data, which covers all UK test stations including Manchester, Stockport, Salford, and surrounding areas.

How much garage revenue can I realistically gain?

Manchester garages average 15-20% revenue lift in month 1, 25-40% by month 3. City Motors saw +£3,200/month (+38%).

What if I have concerns about GDPR/Data?

We're fully GDPR compliant. Customer consent is required. Data is encrypted. You can delete records anytime. We keep your garage secure.

Can I customize reminder messages?

Yes. Complete control over SMS and email templates, branding, phone numbers, links, everything.

How long does implementation take?

Most Manchester garages are live within 2-3 days. Setup is 15 minutes. You can start sending reminders immediately.
